requirement_topic.en: EMC and EAC Conformity for Power Banks with Integrated Electronics — TR CU 020/2011
requirement_topic.zh: 集成电子元件移动电源的EMC与EAC合格评定——TR CU 020/2011
requirement_topic.zht: 整合電子元件行動電源的EMC與EAC合格評定——TR CU 020/2011

summary.en: Power banks (portable battery packs with integrated charging circuitry, USB outputs, and display) are electronic apparatus subject to TR CU 020/2011 (electromagnetic compatibility) in addition to TR CU 004/2011 where in scope. Conformity is demonstrated against the adopted GOST CISPR / GOST IEC EMC standards by an accredited EAEU body and evidenced by the EAC mark. If the power bank incorporates wireless functionality (e.g., Qi wireless charging, Bluetooth state-of-charge indicator, NFC), additional radio-equipment approval applies — within Armenia and the EAEU this is handled through national radio-frequency authorisation and the relevant adopted radio standards, in addition to the EMC requirement. The conformity documentation must cover all applicable technical regulations under a single EAC declaration or certificate.
summary.zh: 移动电源（集成充电电路、USB输出及显示屏的便携式电池组）作为电子装置，除适用范围内的TR CU 004/2011外，还须满足TR CU 020/2011（电磁兼容）。合格评定由EAEU认可机构依据采用版GOST CISPR/GOST IEC EMC标准完成，并以EAC标志为凭证。若移动电源包含无线功能（如Qi无线充电、蓝牙电量指示、NFC），则须附加无线设备核准——在亚美尼亚及EAEU境内，此事项通过国家无线电频率授权及相关采用版无线标准处理，并与EMC要求叠加。合格评定文件须在单一EAC声明或证书下涵盖所有适用技术法规。
summary.zht: 行動電源（整合充電電路、USB輸出及顯示幕的便攜式電池組）作為電子裝置，除適用範圍內的TR CU 004/2011外，還須滿足TR CU 020/2011（電磁相容）。合格評定由EAEU認可機構依據採用版GOST CISPR/GOST IEC EMC標準完成，並以EAC標誌為憑證。若行動電源包含無線功能（如Qi無線充電、藍牙電量指示、NFC），則須附加無線設備核准——在亞美尼亞及EAEU境內，此事項通過國家無線電頻率授權及相關採用版無線標準處理，並與EMC要求疊加。合格評定文件須在單一EAC聲明或證書下涵蓋所有適用技術法規。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 020/2011 — Electromagnetic compatibility of technical equipment (EAEU / Customs Union Technical Regulation)
GOST CISPR 32 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Emission requirements (EAEU adoption)
GOST CISPR 35 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Immunity requirements (EAEU adoption)
National radio-frequency authorisation (Armenia / EAEU) — applicable where wireless functions are present

summary.en: China's domestic EMC requirements for electronic products are governed by GB/T 9254.1-2021 (radio disturbance characteristics of information technology equipment — Class B) for emissions and GB/T 17618-2015 (immunity characteristics of information technology equipment) for immunity. Products with wireless functions require SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval under MIIT administration, specific to Chinese radio frequencies and protocol implementations. Chinese GB/T EMC test reports and SRRC approval are NOT recognised under the EAEU TR CU 020/2011 conformity-assessment pathway or for EAEU radio-frequency authorisation.
summary.zh: 中国电子产品国内EMC要求：辐射方面适用GB/T 9254.1-2021（信息技术设备无线电骚扰特性——B类），抗扰度方面适用GB/T 17618-2015（信息技术设备抗扰度特性）。含无线功能的产品须依据工业和信息化部的SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，具体适用于中国无线电频段和协议实现。中国GB/T EMC检测报告及SRRC核准在EAEU TR CU 020/2011合格评定路径或EAEU无线电频率授权下均不被认可。
summary.zht: 中國電子產品國內EMC要求：輻射方面適用GB/T 9254.1-2021（信息技術設備無線電騷擾特性——B類），抗擾度方面適用GB/T 17618-2015（信息技術設備抗擾度特性）。含無線功能的產品須依據工業和信息化部的SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，具體適用於中國無線電頻段和協議實現。中國GB/T EMC檢測報告及SRRC核准在EAEU TR CU 020/2011合格評定路徑或EAEU無線電頻率授權下均不被認可。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Class B equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB/T 17618-2015 — Information technology equipment — Immunity characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (SAC)
SRRC type approval — State Radio Regulation of China, MIIT — required for products with wireless functions sold in China

gap.en: Power banks with integrated electronics must demonstrate conformity with TR CU 020/2011 against the adopted GOST CISPR / GOST IEC EMC standards, evidenced by the EAC mark. Chinese GB/T 9254 and SRRC approvals may support engineering review but are not accepted as standalone evidence for an EAEU conformity file. For wireless variants: (1) the product must operate within EAEU / Armenian permitted frequency bands; (2) national radio-frequency authorisation is required in addition to EMC conformity; (3) the EAC declaration or certificate must cover all applicable technical regulations together. Many Chinese power banks designed for the domestic market may use channels or wireless protocols requiring re-characterisation for EAEU compliance, and documentation must typically be provided in Russian.
gap.zh: 含集成电子元件的移动电源须依据采用版GOST CISPR/GOST IEC EMC标准证明符合TR CU 020/2011，并以EAC标志为凭证。中国GB/T 9254及SRRC核准可支持工程审查，但不能作为EAEU合格评定文件的独立充分证据。对于无线型号：（1）产品须在EAEU/亚美尼亚许可频段内工作；（2）除EMC合格外还须取得国家无线电频率授权；（3）EAC声明或证书须一并涵盖所有适用技术法规。许多面向中国市场设计的移动电源可能使用的频道或无线协议需经重新表征方可满足EAEU合规，且文件通常须以俄文提供。
gap.zht: 含整合電子元件的行動電源須依據採用版GOST CISPR/GOST IEC EMC標準證明符合TR CU 020/2011，並以EAC標誌為憑證。中國GB/T 9254及SRRC核准可支持工程審查，但不能作為EAEU合格評定文件的獨立充分證據。對於無線型號：（1）產品須在EAEU/亞美尼亞許可頻段內工作；（2）除EMC合格外還須取得國家無線電頻率授權；（3）EAC聲明或證書須一併涵蓋所有適用技術法規。許多面向中國市場設計的行動電源可能使用的頻道或無線協議需經重新表徵方可滿足EAEU合規，且文件通常須以俄文提供。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — TR CU 020/2011 EMC requirements apply to power banks with integrated electronics placed on the EAEU / Armenian market, evidenced by the EAC mark; national radio-frequency authorisation applies additionally for wireless variants
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 9254.1 EMC compliance required; SRRC type approval mandatory for wireless products sold in China (administered by MIIT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Power banks are electronic apparatus subject to EAEU TR CU 020/2011, with wireless variants additionally requiring national radio-frequency authorisation within Armenia / the EAEU. Conformity is demonstrated against adopted GOST CISPR / GOST IEC standards and evidenced by the EAC mark. Chinese GB/T 9254 reports and SRRC approvals are not standalone EAEU conformity evidence. The EAC declaration or certificate must cover TR CU 004/2011, TR CU 020/2011, and TR EAEU 037/2016 obligations together.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 移动电源属于电子装置，须适用EAEU TR CU 020/2011；无线型号在亚美尼亚/EAEU境内还须取得国家无线电频率授权。合格评定依据采用版GOST CISPR/GOST IEC标准并以EAC标志为凭证。中国GB/T 9254报告及SRRC核准不能作为独立的EAEU符合性证据。EAC声明或证书须一并涵盖TR CU 004/2011、TR CU 020/2011及TR EAEU 037/2016义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 行動電源屬於電子裝置，須適用EAEU TR CU 020/2011；無線型號在亞美尼亞/EAEU境內還須取得國家無線電頻率授權。合格評定依據採用版GOST CISPR/GOST IEC標準並以EAC標誌為憑證。中國GB/T 9254報告及SRRC核准不能作為獨立的EAEU符合性證據。EAC聲明或證書須一併涵蓋TR CU 004/2011、TR CU 020/2011及TR EAEU 037/2016義務。

source.publisher: Eurasian Economic Commission (EEC) — TR CU 020/2011 on electromagnetic compatibility
